    hitCeiling(Rectangle2D.Float) - Static method in class model.util.MapReader
    Adjust the position of the hitbox to be right below the ceiling
    hitTheFloor(Rectangle2D.Float) - Static method in class model.util.MapReader
    Adjust the position of the hitbox to be right on the floor
    hitTheWall(Rectangle2D.Float, float) - Static method in class model.util.MapReader
    Adjust the position of the hitbox to be right next to the wall
